full_text:
Wang Zhu 王著
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Zhu (王著). Exiled after Wang Fan died, killed by Guo Ma. Wang Zhu was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
